video_1_adhd_productivity.title: My ADHD Productivity System That Actually Works
video_1_adhd_productivity.description: In this video, I share the exact system I use to manage my ADHD and stay productive. This system combines AI automation, external structure, and realistic expectations.

video_2_ai_tools.title: Best AI Tools for ADHD (That Save Me Hours)
video_2_ai_tools.description: Here are the AI tools that have genuinely transformed how I work. I'll show you exactly how I use each one and why they matter for neurodivergent creators.

video_3_time_blocking.title: ADHD-Friendly Time Blocking Strategy
video_3_time_blocking.description: Traditional time blocking doesn't work for ADHD brains. Here's the system I designed that actually sticks.
